expanded_queries: What is the significance of FVG in market structure?

final_chunks.section_title: OPTIMAL ENTRY WITH FAIR VALUE GAP
final_chunks.text:
OPTIMAL ENTRY WITH FAIR VALUE GAP
A zoomed-in 2-minute chart shows the Fair Value Gap level for a limit order entry. The entry is placed after the market moves energetically (displacement) away from the FVG, breaking a short-term low.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 20_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: IDENTIFYING FAIR VALUE GAPS (FVG) AFTER DISPLACEMENT
final_chunks.text:
IDENTIFYING FAIR VALUE GAPS (FVG) AFTER DISPLACEMENT
After a swing high is taken out and an energetic break below it occurs: Look for a clear Fair Value Gap (FVG) formed by a smashing down movement. The low, the high, and if price trades back up into that FVG, you look for a short entry.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 5_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: MARKET STRUCTURE SHIFT AND FVG ENTRY CONSIDERATIONS
final_chunks.text:
MARKET STRUCTURE SHIFT AND FVG ENTRY CONSIDERATIONS
A definitive drop is observed where previous lows were taken out, followed by a fair value gap. One could have used this fair value gap for entry, but it would require placing a stop loss above the short-term high to account for it.
final_chunks.source: 2023 ICT Mentorship - Opening Range Gap Repricing Macro_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: IDENTIFYING THE FAIR VALUE GAP (FVG) AND ENTRY
final_chunks.text:
IDENTIFYING THE FAIR VALUE GAP (FVG) AND ENTRY
Again, don't take my word for it; you're going to be flabbergasted when you see how many times this thing forms every single week.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 2_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: PREDICTABILITY AND ENTRY PATTERNS
final_chunks.text:
PREDICTABILITY AND ENTRY PATTERNS
These market dynamics tend to repeat a majority of the time, not every day, but often enough to be profitable if conditions align. If you see the 'fingerprints' of these patterns, it's likely to pan out.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 5_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: IDENTIFYING DISPLACEMENT & FVG HUNT ZONE
final_chunks.text:
IDENTIFYING DISPLACEMENT & FVG HUNT ZONE
Market structure shifts occur on all timeframes. For intraday trading: The high that forms after the run on liquidity is the 'displacement high. ' The low that breaks the prior short-term low is the 'displacement low.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 6_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: DRILLING DOWN TO THE 1-MINUTE CHART FOR ENTRY
final_chunks.text:
DRILLING DOWN TO THE 1-MINUTE CHART FOR ENTRY
As the market trades lower after running the 15-minute high: Look for FVG: On lower timeframes, check for FVG formations after a displacement. For example, on a 4 minute chart, after breaking a swing low, a FVG might appear for a short entry.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 6_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: OPTIMAL BEARISH FVG PLACEMENT & ENTRY
final_chunks.text:
OPTIMAL BEARISH FVG PLACEMENT & ENTRY
Optimal bearish ICT Fair Value Gaps are found after a run into buy-side liquidity (above an old high or multiple highs like a double top). This signifies smart money trading up to acquire short positions.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 6_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: TESTING FVG FOR BUY-SIDE OBJECTIVE AND MORNING MOVE ANALYSIS
final_chunks.text:
TESTING FVG FOR BUY-SIDE OBJECTIVE AND MORNING MOVE ANALYSIS
To confirm a bullish move targeting buy-side, observe how price reacts to a Fair Value Gap (FVG). If price trades to the top or midpoint of the FVG, rejects, and goes higher, it signals a move to take out buy-side liquidity.
final_chunks.source: February 15, 2023 ES Live Commentary AM Opening Session_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: SMART MONEY ACCUMULATION AND FVG RETRACEMENT
final_chunks.text:
SMART MONEY ACCUMULATION AND FVG RETRACEMENT
The market's action of running stops serves a purpose: smart money accumulates new long positions while retail traders' trailed stop losses are taken out.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship 2023 - ES Market Review May 17, 2023_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: FVG INTERACTION WITH LIQUIDITY RUNS AND MARKET STRUCTURE (4-HOUR
final_chunks.text:
FVG INTERACTION WITH LIQUIDITY RUNS AND MARKET STRUCTURE (4-HOUR
On a zoomed-in 4-hour chart, specific price levels are delineated. A low is identified for a potential liquidity run on sell stops below it.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 04 - ICT Fair Value Gaps FVG_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: THE 'PAINT ROLLER' ANALOGY FOR INEFFICIENT DELIVERY
final_chunks.text:
THE 'PAINT ROLLER' ANALOGY FOR INEFFICIENT DELIVERY
Imagine painting a wall: when rolling paint down, the initial application is ample, but as you continue, 'porous' pockets appear, meaning the paint hasn't been efficiently delivered. To fix it, you roll back up.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 6_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: MARKET EFFICIENCY PARADIGM & FVG IMPLICATIONS
final_chunks.text:
MARKET EFFICIENCY PARADIGM & FVG IMPLICATIONS
When price trades back into a bearish FVG, and you are bearish, it serves as a short signal, with the expectation of a continued move lower.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 6_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: POTENTIAL RALLY, MARKET STRUCTURE SHIFT, AND STOP LOSS PLACEMENT
final_chunks.text:
POTENTIAL RALLY, MARKET STRUCTURE SHIFT, AND STOP LOSS PLACEMENT
Price is currently up inside a Fair Value Gap, with equal highs present. If price were to rally and find support here, given the time (3:30 PM), a 'macro run' might lead it up into these highs to take out buy side liquidity.
final_chunks.source: Market Review February 10, 2023_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: MARKET STRUCTURE AND NEXT LIQUIDITY OBJECTIVE
final_chunks.text:
MARKET STRUCTURE AND NEXT LIQUIDITY OBJECTIVE
The placement of the stop loss is confident due to supporting market structure: The stop loss is positioned inside the lower end of the Fair Value Gap (FVG). It is also located around the old short-term high near 9:30.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 26 - Example Of Tape Reading Practice_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: FAIR VALUE GAP AS DYNAMIC SUPPORT
final_chunks.text:
FAIR VALUE GAP AS DYNAMIC SUPPORT
The five-minute Fair Value Gap is now above the current price level. In a correct bullish narrative, when price is above a Fair Value Gap, it tends to act as support. This behavior is contrasted with classic support and resistance, which 'hardly ever works'.
final_chunks.source: 5 Handle Twitter Example Live Execution... January 30, 2023_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: ENTRY PATTERN WITHIN BREAKER AND FAIR VALUE GAP
final_chunks.text:
ENTRY PATTERN WITHIN BREAKER AND FAIR VALUE GAP
For an entry pattern, observing the market within the breaker, a fair value gap is identified with candle bodies stopping dead in its tracks. This perfect delivery, followed by a rally to 4012, confirms the setup.
final_chunks.source: 2023 Mentorship Price Action Review & PM Session Reversal Model_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: BEARISH FVG ANNOTATIONS AND TRADE ENTRY
final_chunks.text:
BEARISH FVG ANNOTATIONS AND TRADE ENTRY
The range between Candle 1's low and Candle 3's high is the FVG. Easiest Entry: A limit order just above Candle 3's high (e. g. , one tick above). Stop Loss: Above Candle 1 or above Candle 2.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 6_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: OVERALL DYNAMIC AND PROFIT OBJECTIVES
final_chunks.text:
OVERALL DYNAMIC AND PROFIT OBJECTIVES
Using a 5-minute chart to show the overall dynamic: the price run-up, the rejection, and the optimal trade entry using the 2-minute FVG.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 20_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: CONFIRMATION OF FVG CLOSURE AND DOWNSIDE DELIVERY
final_chunks.text:
CONFIRMATION OF FVG CLOSURE AND DOWNSIDE DELIVERY
At 1. 0474, buy side liquidity is last offered on the up movement. Following this, price moves entirely down from the opening, perfectly filling in the price delivery.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 04 - ICT Fair Value Gaps FVG_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: MARKET REVISITATION OF FAIR VALUE GAPS
final_chunks.text:
MARKET REVISITATION OF FAIR VALUE GAPS
The market's tendency to revisit Fair Value Gaps is explained. Price bumped into the identified SIBI on Friday, with the candle's high at 4547. 75, just a quarter of a point After touching this 'premium' area of the FVG, price retraced lower.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship 2023 - September 05, 2023 Live ES & NQ Tape Reading_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: POST-FVG PRICE ACTION AND SUNDAY GAP AS RESISTANCE
final_chunks.text:
POST-FVG PRICE ACTION AND SUNDAY GAP AS RESISTANCE
After hitting the fair value gap, price broke lower, then returned back up into that range before breaking down again. A small imbalance was observed, and price traded down into the Sunday gap.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 34_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: FAIR VALUE GAP ANALYSIS AND MORNING SESSION OBJECTIVE
final_chunks.text:
FAIR VALUE GAP ANALYSIS AND MORNING SESSION OBJECTIVE
The 15-minute Fair Value Gap (FVG) from the February 9, 2023, 12:30 candle is a key area. The consequent encroachment (midpoint) of this FVG is 4120. 00, which should be annotated on the chart.
final_chunks.source: February 13, 2023 ES Tape Reading AM Session_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: LOWER TIMEFRAME ANALYSIS AND FVG GRADIENT LEVELS SETUP
final_chunks.text:
LOWER TIMEFRAME ANALYSIS AND FVG GRADIENT LEVELS SETUP
Reviewing a Buy Side Imbalance, Sell Side Inefficiency (BISI) and another gap, it is important to note these, even if not kept on the charts going forward.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship 2023 - ES Market Review May 17, 2023_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: SMT DIVERGENCE
final_chunks.text:
SMT DIVERGENCE
The low in ES being taken out is viewed as a stop run, which is a 'turtle soup' entry. While trading NASDAQ wouldn't be incorrect, the sympathy play on ES is favored due to NASDAQ's prior upside delivery.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship 2023 - Advanced Theory On ICT Breaker_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: FVG AND LIQUIDITY POOL INTERACTION ON 5-MINUTE CHART
final_chunks.text:
FVG AND LIQUIDITY POOL INTERACTION ON 5-MINUTE CHART
Examining a 5-minute Euro Dollar chart at the 1. 0475 level. Price pierces this level, trading through 1. 0475 This event demonstrates a run above an old high (1.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 04 - ICT Fair Value Gaps FVG_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: FAIR VALUE GAP AND LIQUIDITY DRAW
final_chunks.text:
FAIR VALUE GAP AND LIQUIDITY DRAW
A correction was issued regarding a previous tweet: a Fair Value Gap (FVG) was mistakenly identified on the 2-minute chart, but it was actually on the 5-minute chart. This 5-minute FVG initially offered short-term resistance.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship 2023 - August 14, 2023 NQ Futures Review_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: MARKET REACTION TO NWOG, FVG, AND PERSISTENT DXY DIVERGENCE
final_chunks.text:
MARKET REACTION TO NWOG, FVG, AND PERSISTENT DXY DIVERGENCE
The market 'keyed off' the 4134. 25 level (an old New Week Opening Gap low) but 'failed to go to the buy side. ' It then respected the 'consequent encroachment' of the teal-colored 5-minute Fair Value Gap, leading to a move lower.
final_chunks.source: February 15, 2023 ES Live Commentary AM Opening Session_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: FAIR VALUE GAP DYNAMICS
final_chunks.text:
FAIR VALUE GAP DYNAMICS
A Fair Value Gap (FVG) was observed on the 15-minute timeframe. After running the buy side, the market drew down, took out sell side, and then overran this FVG, trading into a larger FVG.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship - Episode 41 & Final_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: ES FVG BREAK AND MARKET UNCERTAINTY
final_chunks.text:
ES FVG BREAK AND MARKET UNCERTAINTY
ES has broken through its Fair Value Gap (FVG), and the Dollar Index appears to be expanding higher, making a retracement lower on DXY less likely. This suggests a potential drop off the FVG on ES.
final_chunks.source: February 15, 2023 ES Live Commentary AM Opening Session_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: FVG REJECTION CONFIRMATION AND TARGET ACHIEVEMENT
final_chunks.text:
FVG REJECTION CONFIRMATION AND TARGET ACHIEVEMENT
A hypothetical stop-loss level at 4051 and a quarter was mentioned. This level, above the high of the FVG candle, represents where a stop loss would be. Price did not reach this level.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship ES Market Review ⧹ January 26, 2023_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: LOWER TIMEFRAME ANALYSIS AND FVG BEHAVIOR
final_chunks.text:
LOWER TIMEFRAME ANALYSIS AND FVG BEHAVIOR
Dropping down to a two-minute chart, a fair value gap was identified. ICT reiterated that once price had moved away from this FVG, he did not want to see it return.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 34_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: E-MINI S&P INVERSION FVG AS A STEPPING STONE
final_chunks.text:
E-MINI S&P INVERSION FVG AS A STEPPING STONE
The high of a specific fair value gap (the red line) is used as a reference. On the daily chart, specific candles find support at the high end of this level.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship 2023 - Advanced Theory On ICT Breaker_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: ANTICIPATING A FAIR VALUE GAP WITHIN A RANGE
final_chunks.text:
ANTICIPATING A FAIR VALUE GAP WITHIN A RANGE
Waiting to see if the current ES high holds; if it breaks lower, a Fair Value Gap (FVG) could be created. The focus is on the price leg between the current low and the recently formed high, using 'protraction' (price action within a range) to define it.
final_chunks.source: March 21, 2023 Live Tape Reading - Conquering Your Fear Of Entries_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: IDENTIFYING THE FAIR VALUE GAP (FVG) AND ENTRY
final_chunks.text:
IDENTIFYING THE FAIR VALUE GAP (FVG) AND ENTRY
So, in your chart, once you're developing this idea and learning it, you're going to highlight this candle's low, this candle's high, and this right here is what I teach my students as a 'Fair Value Gap'.
final_chunks.source: 2022 ICT Mentorship Episode 2_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: DETAILED EXPLANATION OF FAIR VALUE GAP (FVG)
final_chunks.text:
DETAILED EXPLANATION OF FAIR VALUE GAP (FVG)
A detailed explanation of the Fair Value Gap is provided, highlighting the mechanics of efficient versus Price started a rally, came up to a candle's high, and then repriced back down into a low.
final_chunks.source: December 2023 Non Farm Payroll Live Execution & Explanations_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: FOCUS ON HIGH PROBABILITY LONG ENTRIES DURING RETRACEMENT
final_chunks.text:
FOCUS ON HIGH PROBABILITY LONG ENTRIES DURING RETRACEMENT
We are looking primarily for high probability long entries. When the retracement occurs, we're looking for specific price levels at which we would expect and anticipate sensitivity for bullish buy opportunities.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 06 - Classic Swing Trading Approach_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: RETRACEMENT AS A POTENTIAL COUNTER-TREND OPPORTUNITY
final_chunks.text:
RETRACEMENT AS A POTENTIAL COUNTER-TREND OPPORTUNITY
We are not trying to time the retracement, but during this small retracement back (if this is a monthly or weekly chart), that 'red area' of retracement could be a counter-trend opportunity.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 06 - Classic Swing Trading Approach_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: RALLY, RETRACEMENT, AND SETUP
final_chunks.text:
RALLY, RETRACEMENT, AND SETUP
When a rally occurs, we simply wait for a retracement. Once that retracement occurs, then you have a stage at which the market will be setting up a condition that permits you to take a trade entry.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 06 - Classic Swing Trading Approach_Handbook.blocks.json

final_chunks.section_title: WAITING FOR RETRACEMENT FROM PREMIUM ARRAYS
final_chunks.text:
WAITING FOR RETRACEMENT FROM PREMIUM ARRAYS
We look for conditions in the marketplace, while it's rallying up, where it could offer resistance. This will be We anticipate the market to start topping out and eventually give us a retracement.
final_chunks.source: ICT Mentorship Core Content - Month 06 - Classic Swing Trading Approach_Handbook.blocks.json
